creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text: I think those two Wiki pages mentioned in the problem description should be merged and rewritten. If anybody can review my attempt at rewriting them, please look at https://bitbucket.org/victor_sudakov/faq/src/4e181ae2de0132967a699abbcd234e257b8d47b5/FreeBSD/Installing_FreeBSD_Root_on_ZFS_using_FreeBSD-ZFS_partition_in_a_FreeBSD_MBR_Slice.txt?at=default and say what you think.
